Psalms90:1 Lord, you have always been our eternal home, our hiding place from generation to generation." 
Psalms90:2 Long before you gave birth to the earth and before the mountains were born, you have been from everlasting to everlasting, the one and only true God." 
Psalms90:3 When you speak the words “Life, return to me!” man turns back to dust." 
Psalms90:4 One thousand years pass before your eyes like yesterday that quickly faded away, like a night’s sleep soon forgotten." 
Psalms90:5 One day we will each be swept away into the sleep of death. We glide along through the tides of time— so quickly gone, like a dream that fades at dawn, like glistening grass that springs up one day and is dry and withered the next, ready to be cut down!" 
Psalms90:6  
Psalms90:7 Terrified by your anger, confined beneath the curse, we live our lives knowing your wrath." 
Psalms90:8 For all of our faults and flaws are in full view to you. Everything we want to hide, you search out and expose by the radiance of your face." 
Psalms90:9 We are banished to live in the shadow of your anger. Our days soon become years until our lifetime comes to an end, finished with nothing but a sigh." 
Psalms90:10 You’ve limited our life span to a mere seventy years, yet some you give grace to live still longer. But even the best of years are marred by tears and toils and in the end are nothing more than a gravestone in a graveyard! We’re gone so quickly, so swiftly; we pass away and simply disappear." 
Psalms90:11 Lord, who fully knows the power of your passion and the intensity of your emotions?" 
Psalms90:12 Help us to remember that our days are numbered, and help us to interpret our lives correctly. Set your wisdom deeply in our hearts so that we may accept your correction." 
Psalms90:13 Return to us again, O God! How much longer will it take until you show us your abundant compassion?" 
Psalms90:14 Let the sunrise of your love end our dark night. Break through our clouded dawn again! Only you can satisfy our hearts, filling us with songs of joy to the end of our days." 
Psalms90:15 We’ve been overwhelmed with grief; come now and overwhelm us with gladness. Replace our years of trouble with decades of delight. 
Psalms90:16 Let us see your miracles again, and let the rising generation see the glorious wonders you’re famous for." 
Psalms90:17 O Lord our God, let your sweet beauty rest upon us. Come work with us, and then our works will endure; you will give us success in all we do." 
Psalms91:1 When you abide under the shadow of Shaddai, you are hidden in the strength of God Most High." 
Psalms91:2 He’s the hope that holds me and the stronghold to shelter me, the only God for me, and my great confidence." 
Psalms91:3 He will rescue you from every hidden trap of the enemy, and he will protect you from false accusation and any deadly curse." 
Psalms91:4 His massive arms are wrapped around you, protecting you. You can run under his covering of majesty and hide. His arms of faithfulness are a shield keeping you from harm." 
Psalms91:5 You will never worry about an attack of demonic forces at night nor have to fear a spirit of darkness coming against you. 
Psalms91:6 Don’t fear a thing! Whether by night or by day, demonic danger will not trouble you, nor will the powers of evil be launched against you." 
Psalms91:7 Even in a time of disaster, with thousands and thousands being killed, you will remain unscathed and unharmed." 
Psalms91:8 You will be a spectator as the wicked perish in judgment, for they will be paid back for what they have done!" 
Psalms91:9 When we live our lives within the shadow of God Most High, our secret hiding place, we will always be shielded from harm. How then could evil prevail against us or disease infect us?" 
Psalms91:10  
Psalms91:11 God sends angels with special orders to protect you wherever you go, defending you from all harm." 
Psalms91:12 If you walk into a trap, they’ll be there for you and keep you from stumbling." 
Psalms91:13 You’ll even walk unharmed among the fiercest powers of darkness, trampling every one of them beneath your feet!" 
Psalms91:14 For here is what the Lord has spoken to me: “Because you loved me, delighted in me, and have been loyal to my name, I will greatly protect you." 
Psalms91:15 I will answer your cry for help every time you pray, and you will feel my presence in your time of trouble. I will deliver you and bring you honor." 
Psalms91:16 I will satisfy you with a full life and with all that I do for you. For you will enjoy the fullness of my salvation!” 
Psalms92:1 It’s so enjoyable to come before you with uncontainable praises spilling from our hearts! How we love to sing our praises over and over to you, to the matchless God, high and exalted over all!" 
Psalms92:2 At each and every sunrise we will be thanking you for your kindness and your love. As the sun sets and all through the night, we will keep proclaiming, “You are so faithful!”" 
Psalms92:3 Melodies of praise will fill the air as every musical instrument, joined with every heart, overflows with worship." 
Psalms92:4 No wonder I’m so glad; I can’t keep it in! Lord, I’m shouting with glee over all you’ve done, for all you’ve done for me:" 
Psalms92:5 what mighty miracles and your power at work—just to name a few! Depths of purpose and layers of meaning saturate everything you do. 
Psalms92:6 Such amazing mysteries are found within every miracle that nearly everyone seems to miss. Those with no discernment can never really discover the deep and glorious secrets hidden in your ways. 
Psalms92:7 It’s true the wicked flourish, but only for a moment; they foolishly forget their destiny with death, that they will all one day be destroyed forevermore." 
Psalms92:8 But you, O Lord, are exalted forever in the highest place of endless glory," 
Psalms92:9 while your opponents, the workers of wickedness, will all perish, forever separated from you." 
Psalms92:10 Your anointing has made me strong and mighty. You’ve empowered my life for triumph by pouring fresh oil over me. 
Psalms92:11 You’ve said that those lying in wait to pounce on me would be defeated, and now it’s happened right in front of my eyes, and I’ve heard their cries of surrender!" 
Psalms92:12 Yes! Look how you’ve made all your devoted lovers to flourish like palm trees, each one growing in victory, standing with strength!" 
Psalms92:13 You’ve transplanted them into your heavenly courtyard, where they are thriving before you," 
Psalms92:14 for in your presence they will still overflow and be anointed. Even in their old age they will stay fresh, bearing luscious fruit and abiding faithfully." 
Psalms92:15 Listen to them! With pleasure they still proclaim: “You’re so good! You’re my beautiful strength! You’ve never made a mistake with me.” 
Psalms93:1 Look! Yahweh now reigns as King! He has covered himself with majesty and strength, wearing them as his splendor-garments. Regal power surrounds him as he sits securely on his throne. He’s in charge of it all, the entire world, and he knows what he’s doing!" 
Psalms93:2 Lord, you have reigned as King from the very beginning of time. Eternity is your home." 
Psalms93:3 Chaos once challenged you. The raging waves lifted themselves over and over, high above the ocean’s depths, letting out their mighty roar! Yet at the sound of your voice they were all stilled by your might. What a majestic King, filled with power!" 
Psalms93:4  
Psalms93:5 Nothing could ever change your royal decrees; they will last forever! Holiness is the beauty that fills your house; you are the one who abides forevermore! 
Psalms94:1 Lord God Almighty, you are the God who takes vengeance on your enemies. It’s time for you to punish evil! Let your rays of revelation-light shine from your people and pierce the conscience of the wicked and punish them." 
Psalms94:2 It’s time to arise as judge of all the earth; arise to punish the proud with the penalty they deserve! 
Psalms94:3 How much longer will you sit back and watch the wicked triumph in their evil, boasting in all that is wrong?" 
Psalms94:4 Listen to them bragging among themselves, big in their own eyes, all because of the crimes they’ve committed against your people! See how they’re crushing those who love you, God, cruelly oppressing those who belong to you." 
Psalms94:5  
Psalms94:6 Heartlessly they murder the widows, the foreigners, and even the orphaned children." 
Psalms94:7 They say to themselves, “The Lord God doesn’t see this. Their God, the God of Jacob, he doesn’t even care!”" 
Psalms94:8 But you’d better watch out, you stupid fools! You’d better wise up! Why would you act like God doesn’t exist? Do you really think that God can’t hear their cries?" 
Psalms94:9 God isn’t hard of hearing; he’ll hear all their cries. God isn’t blind. He who made the eye has superb vision, and he’s watching all you do." 
Psalms94:10 Won’t the God who knows all things know what you’ve done? The God who punishes nations will surely punish you! 
Psalms94:11 The Lord has fully examined every thought of man and found them all to be empty and futile. 
Psalms94:12 Lord Yah, there’s such a blessing that comes when you teach us your Word and your ways. Even the sting of your correction can be sweet." 
Psalms94:13 It rescues us from our days of trouble until you are ready to punish the wicked. 
Psalms94:14 For the Lord will never walk away from his cherished ones, nor would he forsake his chosen ones who belong to him." 
Psalms94:15 Whenever you pronounce judgments, they reveal righteousness. All your devoted lovers will be pleased." 
Psalms94:16 Lord, who will protect me from these wicked ones? If you don’t stand to defend me, who will? I have no one but you!" 
Psalms94:17 I would have been killed so many times if you had not been there for me. 
Psalms94:18 When I screamed out, “Lord, I’m doomed!” your fiery love was stirred, and you raced to my rescue." 
Psalms94:19 Whenever my busy thoughts were out of control, the soothing comfort of your presence calmed me down and overwhelmed me with delight." 
Psalms94:20 It’s obvious to all; you will have nothing to do with corrupt rulers who pass laws that empower evil and defeat what is right. 
Psalms94:21 For they gang up against the lovers of righteousness and condemn the innocent to death. 
Psalms94:22 But I know that all their evil plans will boomerang back onto them. Every plot they hatch will simply seal their own doom. For you, my God, you will destroy them, giving them what they deserve. For you are my true tower of strength, my safe place, my hideout, and my true shelter." 
Psalms94:23  
Psalms95:1 Come on, everyone! Let’s sing for joy to the Lord! Let’s shout our loudest praises to our God who saved us!" 
Psalms95:2 Everyone come meet his face with a thankful heart. Don’t hold back your praises; make him great by your shouts of joy! 
Psalms95:3 For the Lord is the greatest of all, King-God over all other gods!" 
Psalms95:4 In one hand he holds the mysteries of the earth, and in the other he holds the highest mountain peaks." 
Psalms95:5 He’s the owner of every ocean, the engineer and sculptor of earth itself!" 
Psalms95:6 Come and kneel before this Creator-God; come and bow before the mighty God, our majestic maker!" 
Psalms95:7 For we are those he cares for, and he is the God we worship. So drop everything else and listen to his voice! For this is what he’s saying: “Today, when I speak, don’t even think about turning a deaf ear to me like they did when they tested me at Meribah and Massah, the place where they argued with me, their Creator. Your ancestors challenged me over and over with their complaining, even though I had convinced them of my power and love. They still doubted my care for them." 
Psalms95:8  
Psalms95:9  
Psalms95:10 So for forty long years I was grieved and disgusted by them. I described them as wicked wanderers whose hearts would not follow my ways or keep my words. 
Psalms95:11 So I made a vow in my anger and declared, ‘They will not enter the resting place I’ve planned for them!’ So don’t you ever be hard-hearted or stubborn like they were! ”" 
Psalms96:1 Go ahead—sing your new song to the Lord! Let everyone in every language sing him a new song. 
Psalms96:2 Don’t stop! Keep on singing! Make his name famous! Tell everyone every day how wonderful he is. Give them the good news of our great Savior. Take the message of his glory and miracles to every nation. Tell them about all the amazing things he has done. 
Psalms96:3  
Psalms96:4 For the Lord’s greatness is beyond description, and he deserves all the praise that comes to him. He is our King-God, and it’s right to be in holy awe of him." 
Psalms96:5 Other gods are absolutely worthless. For the Lord God is Creator-God, who spread the splendor of the skies!" 
Psalms96:6 Breathtaking brilliance and awe-inspiring majesty radiate from his shining presence. His stunning beauty overwhelms all who come before him. 
Psalms96:7 Surrender to the Lord Yahweh, all you nations and peoples. Surrender to him all your pride and strength." 
Psalms96:8 Confess that Yahweh alone deserves all the glory and honor. Bring an offering and come celebrate in his courts. 
Psalms96:9 Come worship the Lord God wearing the splendor of holiness. Let everyone wait in wonder as they tremble in awe before him. 
Psalms96:10 Tell the nations plainly that Yahweh rules over all! He is doing a great job, and nothing will disrupt him, for he treats everyone fair and square." 
Psalms96:11 Let the skies sing for joy! Let the earth join in the chorus. Let oceans thunder and fields echo this ecstatic praise until every swaying tree of every forest joins in, lifting up their songs of joyous praise to him!" 
Psalms96:12  
Psalms96:13 For here he comes, the Lord God, and he’s ready to judge the world. He will do what’s right and can be trusted to always do what’s fair." 
Psalms97:1 Yahweh now reigns as King! Let everyone rejoice! His rule extends everywhere, even to distant lands, and the islands of the sea, let them all be glad." 
Psalms97:2 Clouds both dark and mysterious now surround him. His throne of glory rests upon a foundation of righteousness and justice. 
Psalms97:3 All around him burns a blazing glory-fire consuming all his foes. 
Psalms97:4 When his lightning strikes, it lights up the world. People are wide-eyed as they tremble and shake." 
Psalms97:5 Mountains melt away like wax in a fire when the Lord of all the earth draws near. 
Psalms97:6 Heaven’s messengers preach righteousness, and people everywhere see God’s glory in the sky!" 
Psalms97:7 Shame covers all who boast in other gods, for they worship idols. For all the supernatural powers once worshiped the true and living God." 
Psalms97:8 But God’s Zion-people are content, for they know and hear the truth. The people of praise rejoice over all your judgments, O Lord!" 
Psalms97:9 For you are King-God, the Most High God over all the earth. You are exalted above every supernatural power!" 
Psalms97:10 Listen, you lovers of God! Hate evil, for God can keep you from wrong and protect you from the power of wickedness." 
Psalms97:11 For he sows seeds of light within his devoted lovers, and seeds of joy burst forth for the lovers of God!" 
Psalms97:12 So be glad and continue to give him thanks, for God’s holiness is seen in everything he does." 
Psalms98:1 Go ahead—sing your brand-new song to the Lord! He is famous for his miracles and marvels, for he is victorious through his mighty power and holy strength." 
Psalms98:2 Everyone knows how God has saved us, for he has displayed his justice throughout history." 
Psalms98:3 He never forgets to show us his love and faithfulness. How kind he has been to Israel! All the nations know how he stands behind his people and how he saves his own. 
Psalms98:4 So go ahead, everyone, and shout out your praises with joy! Break out of the box and let loose with the most joyous sound of praise!" 
Psalms98:5 Sing your melody of praise to the Lord and make music like never before! 
Psalms98:6 Blow those trumpets and shofars! Shout with joyous triumph before King Yahweh! 
Psalms98:7 Let the ocean’s waves join in the chorus with their roaring praise until everyone everywhere shouts out in unison, “Glory to the Lord!”" 
Psalms98:8 Let the rivers and streams clap with applause as the mountains rise in a standing ovation to join the mighty choir of exaltation. 
Psalms98:9 Look! Here he comes! The Lord and judge of all the earth! He’s coming to make things right and to do it fair and square. And everyone will see that he does all things well! 
Psalms99:1 Yahweh is King over all! Everyone trembles in awe before him. He rules enthroned between the wings of the cherubim. So let the earth shake and quake in wonder before him! 
Psalms99:2 For Yahweh is great and glorious in the midst of his Zion-people. He is exalted above all! 
Psalms99:3 Let everyone praise this breathtaking God, for he is holy." 
Psalms99:4 A lover of justice is our mighty King; he is right in all his ways. He insists on being fair to all, promoting true justice and righteousness in Jacob." 
Psalms99:5 So everyone, exalt the Lord our God facedown before his glory-throne, for he is great and holy." 
Psalms99:6 God has his praying priests, like Moses, Aaron, and Samuel, who all interceded, asking God for help. God heard their cries and came to their rescue." 
Psalms99:7 He spoke to them from the pillar of clouds, and they followed his instructions, doing everything he told them." 
Psalms99:8 God, the great forgiver, answered their prayers, yet he would punish them when they went astray." 
Psalms99:9 Keep exalting the Lord our God facedown before his glory-throne, for he is great and holy!" 
Psalms100:1 Lift up a great shout of joy to Yahweh! Go ahead and do it—everyone, everywhere!" 
Psalms100:2 Worship Yahweh with gladness. Sing your way into his presence with joy! 
Psalms100:3 And realize what this really means— we have the privilege of worshiping Yahweh our God. For he is our Creator and we belong to him. We are the people of his pleasure. 
Psalms100:4 You can pass through his open gates with the password of praise. Come right into his presence with thanksgiving. Come bring your thank offering to him and affectionately bless his beautiful name! 
Psalms100:5 For Yahweh is always good and ready to receive you. He’s so loving that it will amaze you— so kind that it will astound you! And he is famous for his faithfulness toward all. Everyone knows our God can be trusted, for he keeps his promises to every generation!" 
Psalms101:1 Lord, I will sing about your faithful love for me. My song of praise will have your justice as its theme." 
Psalms101:2 I’m trying my best to walk in the way of integrity, especially in my own home. But I need your help! I’m wondering, Lord, when will you appear?" 
Psalms101:3 I refuse to gaze on that which is vulgar. I despise works of evil people and anything that moves my heart away from you. I will not let evil hold me in its grip. 
Psalms101:4 Every perverse and crooked way I have put away from my heart, for I will have nothing to do with the deeds of darkness." 
Psalms101:5 I will silence those who secretly want to slander my friends, and I will not tolerate the proud and arrogant." 
Psalms101:6 My innermost circle will only be those who I know are pure and godly. They will be the only ones I allow to minister to me. 
Psalms101:7 There’s no room in my home for hypocrites, for I can’t stand chronic liars who flatter and deceive." 
Psalms101:8 At each and every sunrise I will awake to do what’s right and put to silence those who love wickedness, freeing God’s people from their evil grip. I will do all of this because of my great love for you!" 
Psalms102:1 Lord, listen to my prayer! Listen to my cry for help!" 
Psalms102:2 You can’t hide your face from me in the day of my distress. Stoop down to hear my prayer and answer me quickly, Lord!" 
Psalms102:3 For my days of happiness have gone up in smoke. My body is raging with fever, my heart is sick, and I’m consumed by this illness— withered like a dead leaf. I can’t even eat." 
Psalms102:4  
Psalms102:5 I’m nothing but skin and bones. Nothing’s left of me but whispered groans. 
Psalms102:6 I’m like a pelican of the wilderness, like an owl among the ruins." 
Psalms102:7 I’m sleepless, shivering in the cold, forlorn, and friendless, like a lonely bird on the rooftop." 
Psalms102:8 My every enemy mocks and insults me incessantly. They even use my name as a curse to speak over others! 
Psalms102:9 Because of your great and furious anger against me, all I do is suffer with sorrow, with nothing to eat but a meal of mourning. My crying fills my cup with salty tears! In your wrath you have rejected me, sweeping me away like dirt on the floor." 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 My days are marked by the lengthening shadows of death. I’m withering away and there’s nothing left of me. 
Psalms102:12 But then I remember that you, O Lord, still sit enthroned as King over all! The fame of your name will be revealed to every generation." 
Psalms102:13 I know you are about to arise and show your tender love to Zion. Now is the time, Lord, for your compassion and mercy to be poured out— the appointed time has come for your prophetic promises to be fulfilled!" 
Psalms102:14 For your servants weep in sympathy over Zion’s ruins and feel love for her every stone. 
Psalms102:15 When you arise to intervene, all the nations and kings will be stunned and will fear your awesome name, trembling before your glory!" 
Psalms102:16 Yes, you will reveal yourself to Zion and appear in the brightness of your glory to restore her and give her children." 
Psalms102:17 He responds to the prayer of the poor and broken and will not despise the cry of the homeless. 
Psalms102:18 Write all this down for the coming generation, so re-created people will read it and praise the Lord!" 
Psalms102:19 Tell them how Yah looked down from his high and holy place, gazing from his glory to survey the earth." 
Psalms102:20 He listened to all the groaning of his people longing to be free, and he set loose the sons of death to experience life." 
Psalms102:21 Multitudes will stream to Jerusalem to praise the Lord and declare his name in Zion! 
Psalms102:22 Peoples from every land, their kings and kingdoms, will gather together to worship the Lord." 
Psalms102:23 But God has brought me to my knees, shortening my life." 
Psalms102:24 So I cry out to you, my God, Father of eternity, please don’t let me die! I know my life is not yet finished." 
Psalms102:25 With your hands you once formed the foundations of the earth and handcrafted the heavens above. 
Psalms102:26 They will all fade away one day like worn-out clothing, ready to be discarded, but you’ll still be here. You will replace it all! Your first creation will be changed, but you alone will endure, the God of all eternity!" 
Psalms102:27  
Psalms102:28 Generation after generation our descendants will live securely, for you are the one protecting us, keeping us for yourself." 
Psalms103:1 With my whole heart, with my whole life, and with my innermost being, I bow in wonder and love before you, the holy God!" 
Psalms103:2 Yahweh, you are my soul’s celebration. How could I ever forget the miracles of kindness you’ve done for me?" 
Psalms103:3 You kissed my heart with forgiveness, in spite of all I’ve done. You’ve healed me inside and out from every disease." 
Psalms103:4 You’ve rescued me from hell and saved my life. You’ve crowned me with love and mercy. 
Psalms103:5 You satisfy my every desire with good things. You’ve supercharged my life so that I soar again like a flying eagle in the sky! 
Psalms103:6 You’re a God who makes things right, giving justice to the defenseless." 
Psalms103:7 You unveiled to Moses your plans and showed Israel’s sons what you could do. 
Psalms103:8 Lord, you’re so kind and tenderhearted and so patient with people who fail you! Your love is like a flooding river overflowing its banks with kindness." 
Psalms103:9 You don’t look at us only to find our faults, just so that you can hold a grudge against us." 
Psalms103:10 You may discipline us for our many sins, but never as much as we really deserve. Nor do you get even with us for what we’ve done." 
Psalms103:11 Higher than the highest heavens— that’s how high your tender mercy extends! Greater than the grandeur of heaven above is the greatness of your loyal love, towering over all who fear you and bow down before you!" 
Psalms103:12 Farther than from a sunrise to a sunset— that’s how far you’ve removed our guilt from us. 
Psalms103:13 The same way a loving father feels toward his children— that’s but a sample of your tender feelings toward us, your beloved children, who live in awe of you." 
Psalms103:14 You know all about us, inside and out. You are mindful that we’re made from dust." 
Psalms103:15 Our days are so few, and our momentary beauty so swiftly fades away!" 
Psalms103:16 Then all of a sudden we’re gone, like grass clippings blown away in a gust of wind, taken away to our appointment with death, leaving nothing to show that we were here." 
Psalms103:17 But Lord, your endless love stretches from one eternity to the other, unbroken and unrelenting toward those who fear you and those who bow facedown in awe before you. Your faithfulness to keep every gracious promise you’ve made passes from parents, to children, to grandchildren, and beyond." 
Psalms103:18 You are faithful to all those who follow your ways and keep your word. 
Psalms103:19 Yahweh has established his throne in heaven; his kingdom rules the entire universe. 
Psalms103:20 So bless the Lord, all his messengers of power, for you are his mighty heroes who listen intently to the voice of his word to do it." 
Psalms103:21 Bless and praise the Lord, you mighty warriors, ministers who serve him well and fulfill his desires." 
Psalms103:22 I will bless and praise the Lord with my whole heart! Let all his works throughout the earth, wherever his dominion stretches— let everything bless the Lord!" 
Psalms104:1 Everything I am will praise and bless the Lord! O Lord, my God, your greatness takes my breath away, overwhelming me by your majesty, beauty, and splendor!" 
Psalms104:2 You wrap yourself with a shimmering, glistening light. You wear sunshine like a garment of glory. You stretch out the starry skies like a tapestry." 
Psalms104:3 You build your balconies with light beams and ride as King in a chariot you made from clouds. You fly upon the wings of the wind. 
Psalms104:4 You make your messengers into winds of the Spirit, and all your ministers become flames of fire." 
Psalms104:5 You, our Creator, formed the earth, and you hold it all together so it will never fall apart." 
Psalms104:6 You poured the ocean depths over the planet, submerging mountains beneath." 
Psalms104:7 Yet at the sound of your thunder-shout the waters all fled away, filling the deep with seas." 
Psalms104:8 The mountains rose and valleys sank to the levels you decreed for them. 
Psalms104:9 Then you set a boundary line for the seas and commanded them not to trespass. 
Psalms104:10 You sent springs cascading through the valleys, flowing freely between the mountains and hills." 
Psalms104:11 You provide drink for every living thing; men and beasts have their thirst quenched because of you. 
Psalms104:12 The birds build nests near the tranquil streams, chirping their joyous songs from the branches above." 
Psalms104:13 From your kindness you send the rain to water the mountains from the upper rooms of your palace. Your goodness brings forth fruit for all to enjoy. 
Psalms104:14 Your compassion brings the earth’s harvest, feeding the hungry. You cause the grass to grow for livestock, along with the fruit, grains, and vegetables to feed mankind." 
Psalms104:15 You provide sweet wine to gladden hearts. You give us daily bread to sustain life, giving us glowing health for our bodies." 
Psalms104:16 The trees of the Lord drink until they’re satisfied. Lebanon’s lofty trees stand tall right where you planted them. 
Psalms104:17 Within their branches you provide for birds a place to build their nests; even herons find a home in the cypress trees. 
Psalms104:18 You make the high mountains a home for wild goats and the rocky crag where the rock badgers burrow. 
Psalms104:19 You made the moon to mark the months and the sun to measure the days. 
Psalms104:20 You turn off the light and it becomes night, and all the beasts of the forest come out to prowl." 
Psalms104:21 The mighty lions roar for their dinner, but it’s you, God, who feeds them all." 
Psalms104:22 At sunrise they slink back to their dens to crouch down in the shadows. 
Psalms104:23 Then man goes out to his labor and toil, working from dawn to dusk." 
Psalms104:24 O Lord, what an amazing variety of all you have created! Wild and wonderful is this world you have made, while wisdom was there at your side. This world is full of so many creatures, yet each belongs to you!" 
Psalms104:25 And then there is the sea! So vast! So wide and deep— swarming with countless forms of sea life, both small and great." 
Psalms104:26 Trading ships glide through the high seas. And look! There are the massive whales bounding upon the waves. 
Psalms104:27 All the creatures wait expectantly for you to give them their food as you determine. 
Psalms104:28 You come near and they all gather around, feasting from your open hands, and each is satisfied from your abundant supply." 
Psalms104:29 But if you were to withhold from them and turn away, they all would panic. And when you choose to take away their breath, each one dies and returns to the dust." 
Psalms104:30 When you release your Spirit-Wind, life is created, ready to replenish life upon the earth." 
Psalms104:31 May God’s glorious splendor endure forever! May the Lord take joy and pleasure in all that he has made. 
Psalms104:32 For the earth’s overseer has the power to make it tremble; just a touch of his finger and volcanoes erupt as the earth shakes and melts. 
Psalms104:33 I will sing my song to the Lord as long as I live! Every day I will sing my praises to God. 
Psalms104:34 May you be pleased with every sweet thought I have about you, for you are the source of my joy and gladness." 
Psalms104:35 Now, let all the sinners be swept from the earth. But I will keep on praising you, my Lord, with all that is within me. My joyous, blissful shouts of “Hallelujah” are all because of you!" 
Psalms105:1 Go ahead and give God thanks for all the glorious things he has done! Go ahead and worship him! Tell everyone about his wonders! 
Psalms105:2 Let’s sing his praises! Sing, and put all of his miracles to music!" 
Psalms105:3 Shine and make your joyful boast in him, you lovers of God. Let’s be happy and keep rejoicing no matter what." 
Psalms105:4 Seek more of his strength! Seek more of him! Let’s always be seeking the light of his face. 
Psalms105:5 Don’t you ever forget his miracles and marvels. Hold to your heart every judgment he has decreed. 
Psalms105:6 For you are his servants, the true seed of Abraham, and you are the chosen ones, Jacob’s sons." 
Psalms105:7 For he is the Lord our God, and his wise authority can be seen in all he does." 
Psalms105:8 For though a thousand generations may pass away, he is still true to his word. He has kept every promise he made to Abraham and to Isaac." 
Psalms105:9  
Psalms105:10 His promises have become an everlasting covenant to Jacob, as a decree to Jacob." 
Psalms105:11 He said to them, “I will give you all the land of Canaan as your inheritance.”" 
Psalms105:12 They were very few in number when God gave them that promise, and they were all foreigners to that land." 
Psalms105:13 They were wandering from one land to another and from one kingdom to another. 
Psalms105:14 Yet God would not permit anyone to touch them, punishing even kings who came against them." 
Psalms105:15 He said to them, “Don’t you dare lay a hand on my anointed ones, and don’t do a thing to hurt my prophets!”" 
Psalms105:16 So God decreed a famine upon Canaan-land, cutting off their food supply." 
Psalms105:17 But he had already sent a man ahead of his people to Egypt; it was Joseph, who was sold as a slave." 
Psalms105:18 His feet were bruised by strong shackles and his soul was held by iron. 
Psalms105:19 God’s promise to Joseph purged his character until it was time for his dreams to come true. 
Psalms105:20 Eventually, the king of Egypt sent for him, setting him free at last." 
Psalms105:21 Then Joseph was put in charge of everything under the king; he became the master of the palace over all the royal possessions. 
Psalms105:22 Pharoah gave him authority over all the princes of the land, and Joseph became the teacher of wisdom to the king’s advisers." 
Psalms105:23 Then Jacob, with all of Joseph’s family, came from Canaan to Egypt and settled in Goshen." 
Psalms105:24 God made them very fruitful, and they multiplied incredibly until they were greater in number than those who ruled them." 
Psalms105:25 God turned their hearts to hate his people and to deal treacherously with his servants. 
Psalms105:26 But he sent them his faithful servant, Moses, the deliverer, and chose Aaron to accompany him." 
Psalms105:27 Their command brought down signs and wonders, working miracles in Egypt." 
Psalms105:28 By God’s direction, they spoke and released a plague of thick darkness over the land." 
Psalms105:29 God turned their rivers to blood, causing every fish to die." 
Psalms105:30 And the judgment-plague of frogs came in enormous numbers, swarming everywhere, even into Pharaoh’s bedroom!" 
Psalms105:31 God spoke and another plague was released— massive swarms of flies, vast clouds of insects, covered the land." 
Psalms105:32 God rained down hail and flaming fire upon Egypt. 
Psalms105:33 Their gardens and vines were all destroyed, shattering trees into splinters throughout the territory." 
Psalms105:34 God spoke, and devouring hordes of locusts swept over the land," 
Psalms105:35 picking the ground clean of vegetation and crops. 
Psalms105:36 Then God struck down their firstborn sons, the pride and joy of every Egyptian family." 
Psalms105:37 At last, God freed all the Hebrews from their slavery and sent them away laden with the silver and gold of Egypt. And not even one was feeble on their way out!" 
Psalms105:38 Egypt was relieved at their exodus, ready to see them go, for the terror of the Lord of the Hebrews had fallen upon them!" 
Psalms105:39 God spread out a cloud as shade as they moved ahead and a cloud of fire to light up their night. 
Psalms105:40 Moses prayed and God brought them quail to eat. He satisfied them with heaven’s bread falling from the sky. 
Psalms105:41 He broke open the boulder and the waters poured out like a river in the desert. 
Psalms105:42 For God could never forget his holy promise to his servant Abraham. 
Psalms105:43 So God brought out his chosen ones with singing; with a joyful shout they were set free! 
Psalms105:44 He gave them lands and nations, just like he promised. Fruitful lands of crops they had never planted were now theirs." 
Psalms105:45 All this was done for them so that they would be faithful to keep the ways of God, obeying his laws and following his truths. Hallelujah! Praise the Lord!" 
Psalms106:1 Hallelujah! Praise the Lord! Everyone thank God, for he is good and easy to please. Your tender love for us, Lord, continues on forever." 
Psalms106:2 Who could ever fully describe your glorious miracles? Yahweh, who could ever praise you enough?" 
Psalms106:3 The happiest one on earth is the one who keeps your word and clings to righteousness every moment. 
Psalms106:4 So remember me, Lord, as you take joy in your people. And when you come to bring the blessings of salvation, don’t forget me!" 
Psalms106:5 Let me share in the wealth and beauty of all your devoted lovers, rejoice with your nation in all their joys, and let me share in the glory you give to your chosen ones." 
Psalms106:6 We have all sinned so much, just like our fathers. “Guilty” is written over our lives." 
Psalms106:7 Our fathers who were delivered from Egypt didn’t fully understand your wonders, and they took you for granted. Over and over you showed them such tender love and mercy! Yet they were barely beyond the Red Sea when they rebelled against you." 
Psalms106:8 Nonetheless, you saved them more than once so they would know how powerful you are, showing them the honor of your name." 
Psalms106:9 You roared over the waters of the Red Sea, making a dry path for your people to cross through." 
Psalms106:10 You freed them from the strong power of those who oppressed them and rescued them from bondage. 
Psalms106:11 Then the waters rushed over their enemies and drowned them all— not one survived. 
Psalms106:12 Seeing this, the people believed your words, and they all broke out with songs of praise!" 
Psalms106:13 Yet how quickly they forgot your miracles of power. They wouldn’t wait for you to act when they were hungry," 
Psalms106:14 but demanded you satisfy their cravings and give them food! They tested you to the breaking point. 
Psalms106:15 So you gave them what they wanted to eat, but their souls starved away to nothing." 
Psalms106:16 They became envious of Moses and Aaron, your holy ones." 
Psalms106:17 You split open the earth, and it swallowed up Dathan and Abiram along with their followers." 
Psalms106:18 Fire fell from heaven and burnt up all the band of rebels, turning them to ashes." 
Psalms106:19 They made an idol of a calf at Sinai and bowed to worship their man-made statue. 
Psalms106:20 They preferred the image of a grass-eating ox to the presence of the glory-filled God. 
Psalms106:21 They totally forgot it was you who saved them by the wonders and awesome miracles you worked in Egypt. 
Psalms106:22  
Psalms106:23 So you decided to destroy them. But Moses, your chosen leader, stood in the gap between you and the people and made intercession on their behalf to turn away your wrath from killing them all." 
Psalms106:24 Yet they still didn’t believe your words and they despised the land of delight you gave to them. 
Psalms106:25 They grumbled and found fault with everything and closed their hearts to your voice. 
Psalms106:26 So you solemnly swore to them that they would all die in the desert. 
Psalms106:27 And you scattered their children to distant lands to die as exiles. 
Psalms106:28 Then our fathers joined the worshipers of the false god named “Lord of the Pit.” They even ate the sacrifices offered to the dead! 
Psalms106:29 All they did made you burn with anger. It made you so angry that a plague broke out among them! 
Psalms106:30 It continued until Phineas intervened and executed the guilty for causing judgment to fall upon them. 
Psalms106:31 Because of this deed of righteousness Phineas will be remembered forever. 
Psalms106:32 Your people also provoked you to wrath at the stream called Strife. This is where Moses got into serious trouble! 
Psalms106:33 Because the people were rebellious against you, Moses exploded in anger and spoke to them out of his bitterness." 
Psalms106:34 Neither did our fathers destroy the enemies in the land, as you had commanded them." 
Psalms106:35 But they mingled themselves with their enemies and learned to copy their works of darkness. 
Psalms106:36 They began to serve their gods and bow before their idols. All of this led them away from you and brought about their downfall. 
Psalms106:37 They even sacrificed their little children to the demon spirits," 
Psalms106:38 shedding the innocent blood of their sons and daughters. These dark practices greatly defiled the land and their own souls, through the murder and bloodshed of their own babies! Their sins made them spiritual adulterers before you." 
Psalms106:39  
Psalms106:40 This is why you were furious. As your anger burned hot against them, you couldn’t even stand to look at your very own people any longer!" 
Psalms106:41 So you turned them over to the crushing hands of other nations, and those who hated them became tyrants over them." 
Psalms106:42 Oppressive enemies subdued them, ruling over them with their tyranny." 
Psalms106:43 Many times you would have come to rescue them, but they continued in their rebellious ways, choosing to ignore your warnings. Then they sank lower and lower, destroyed by their depravity." 
Psalms106:44 Yet even so, you waited and waited, watching to see if they would turn and cry out to you for a father’s help. And then, when you heard their cry, you relented and you remembered your covenant, and you turned your heart toward them again, according to your abundant, overflowing, and limitless love." 
Psalms106:45  
Psalms106:46 Then you caused even their oppressors to pity them and show them compassion. 
Psalms106:47 Do it again, Lord! Save us, O Lord, our God! Gather us from our exile and unite us together so that we will give our great and joyous thanks to you again and bring you glory by our praises." 
Psalms106:48 Blessed be our Lord God forever and ever. And let everyone everywhere say, “Hallelujah!” Amen! Faithful is our King!" 
Psalms107:1 Let everyone give all their praise and thanks to the Lord! Here’s why—he’s better than anyone could ever imagine. Yes, he’s always loving and kind, and his faithful love never ends." 
Psalms107:2 So, go ahead—let everyone know it! Tell the world how he broke through and delivered you from the power of darkness and has gathered us together from all over the world. He has set us free to be his very own!" 
Psalms107:3  
Psalms107:4 Some of us once wandered in the wilderness like desert nomads, with no true direction or dwelling place." 
Psalms107:5 Starving, thirsting, staggering, we became desperate and filled with despair." 
Psalms107:6 Then we cried out, “Lord, help us! Rescue us!” And he did!" 
Psalms107:7 He led us out by the right way until we reached a suitable city to dwell in. 
Psalms107:8 So lift your hands and thank God for his marvelous kindness and for all his miracles of mercy for those he loves. 
Psalms107:9 How he satisfies the souls of thirsty ones and fills the hungry with goodness! 
Psalms107:10 Some of us once sat in darkness, living in the dark shadows of death. We were prisoners to our pain, chained to our regrets." 
Psalms107:11 For we rebelled against God’s Word and rejected the wise counsel of God Most High. 
Psalms107:12 So he humbled us through our circumstances, watching us as we stumbled, with no one there to pick us back up. Our own pain became our punishment." 
Psalms107:13 Then we cried out, “Lord, help us! Rescue us!” And he did!" 
Psalms107:14 His light broke through the darkness and he led us out in freedom from death’s dark shadow and snapped every one of our chains. 
Psalms107:15 So lift your hands and give thanks to God for his marvelous kindness and for his miracles of mercy for those he loves! 
Psalms107:16 For he smashed through heavy prison doors and shattered the steel bars that held us back, just to set us free!" 
Psalms107:17 Some of us were such fools, bringing on ourselves sorrow and suffering all because of our sins." 
Psalms107:18 Sick and feeble, unable to stand the sight of food, we drew near to the gates of death." 
Psalms107:19 Then we cried out, “Lord, help us! Rescue us!” And he did!" 
Psalms107:20 God spoke the words “Be healed,” and we were healed, delivered from death’s door!" 
Psalms107:21 So lift your hands and give thanks to God for his marvelous kindness and for his miracles of mercy for those he loves! 
Psalms107:22 Bring your praise as an offering and your thanks as a sacrifice as you sing your story of miracles with a joyful song. 
Psalms107:23 Some of us set sail upon the sea to faraway ports, transporting our goods from ship to shore." 
Psalms107:24 We were witnesses of God’s power out in the ocean deep; we saw breathtaking wonders upon the high seas. 
Psalms107:25 When God spoke he stirred up a storm, lifting high the waves with hurricane winds." 
Psalms107:26 Ships were tossed by the swelling sea, rising to the sky, then dropping down to the depths, reeling like drunkards, spinning like tops, everyone at their wits’ end until even sailors despaired of life, cringing in terror." 
Psalms107:27  
Psalms107:28 Then we cried out, “Lord, help us! Rescue us!” And he did!" 
Psalms107:29 God stilled the storm, calmed the waves, and he hushed the hurricane winds to only a whisper." 
Psalms107:30 We were so relieved, so glad as he guided us safely to harbor in a quiet haven." 
Psalms107:31 So lift your hands and give thanks to God for his marvelous kindness and for his miracles of mercy for those he loves! 
Psalms107:32 Let’s exalt him on high and lift up our praises in public; let all the people and the leaders of the nation know how great and wonderful is Yahweh, our God!" 
Psalms107:33 Whenever he chooses he can dry up a river and turn the land into a desert. 
Psalms107:34 Or he can take a fruitful land and make it into a saltwater swamp, all because of the wickedness of those who dwell there." 
Psalms107:35 But he also can turn a barren wilderness into an oasis with water! He can make springs flow into desert lands 
Psalms107:36 and turn them into fertile valleys so that cities spring up, and he gives it all to those who are hungry." 
Psalms107:37 They can plant their fields and vineyards there and reap a bumper crop and gather a fruitful harvest. 
Psalms107:38 God will bless them and cause them to multiply and prosper. 
Psalms107:39 But others will become poor, humbled because of their oppression, tyranny, and sorrows." 
Psalms107:40 For God pours contempt upon their arrogant abuse of power, heaping scorn upon their princes, and makes them wander among ruins." 
Psalms107:41 But he raises up the poor and lowly with his favor, giving them a safe place to live where no one can touch them. God will grant them a large family and bless them!" 
Psalms107:42 The lovers of God will rejoice when they see this. Good men are glad when the evil ones are silenced. 
Psalms107:43 If you are truly wise, you’ll learn from what I’ve told you. It’s time for you to consider these profound lessons of God’s great love and mercy!" 
Psalms108:1 My heart, O God, is focused and determined. Now I can sing my song with passionate praises! Awake, O my soul, with the music of his splendor." 
Psalms108:2 Arise, my soul, and sing his praises! I will awaken the dawn with my worship, greeting the daybreak with my songs of light." 
Psalms108:3 Wherever I go, I will thank you. All the nations will hear my praise songs to you." 
Psalms108:4 Your love is so extravagant, it reaches higher than the heavens! Your faithfulness is so astonishing, it stretches to the skies!" 
Psalms108:5 Lord God, be exalted as you soar throughout the heavens. May your shining glory be seen high above all the earth!" 
Psalms108:6 Come to your beloved ones and gently draw us out. Answer our prayer for your saving help. Come with your might and strength, for we need you, Lord!" 
Psalms108:7 Then I heard the Lord speak in his holy splendor, and from his sanctuary I heard the Lord promise: “In my triumph I will be the one to measure out the portion of my inheritance to my people, and I will secure the land as I promised you. Shechem, Succoth, Gilead, Manasseh — they are all still mine!” he says. “Judah will continue to produce kings and lawgivers, and Ephraim will produce great warriors. Moab will become my lowly servant. Edom will likewise serve my purposes. I will lift up a shout of victory over the land of Philistia!" 
Psalms108:8  
Psalms108:9  
Psalms108:10 But who will bring my triumph into Edom’s fortresses?” 
Psalms108:11 Lord, have you really rejected us, refusing to fight our battles?" 
Psalms108:12 Give us a father’s help when we face our enemies. For to trust in any man is an empty hope. 
Psalms108:13 With God’s help we will prevail with might and power. And with God’s help we’ll trample down our every foe! 
Psalms109:1 God of all my praise, don’t stand silently by, aloof to my pain," 
Psalms109:2 while the wicked slander me with their lies. Even right in front of my face they lie through their teeth. 
Psalms109:3 I’ve done nothing to them, but they still surround me with their venomous words of hatred and vitriol." 
Psalms109:4 Though I love them, they stand accusing me like Satan for what I’ve never done. I will pray until I become prayer itself." 
Psalms109:5 They continually repay me with evil when I show them good. They give me hatred when I show them love. 
Psalms109:6 Show him how it feels! Let accusing liars be raised up against him, like Satan himself standing right next to him. And let him be declared guilty by a wicked judge. May even his prayers be seen as sinful!" 
Psalms109:7  
Psalms109:8 Shorten his life and let another replace him! 
Psalms109:9 Make his wife a widow and his children orphans! 
Psalms109:10 Let them wander as beggars in the street, like homeless vagabonds, evicted from their ruins!" 
Psalms109:11 Let the creditors seize his entire estate, and strangers, like vultures, take all that’s left!" 
Psalms109:12 Let no one be kind to him by showing pity to his fatherless children! 
Psalms109:13 May all his posterity die with him! Cut down his family tree! 
Psalms109:14 And may all the sins of his ancestors be recorded, remembered before you, forever! Cut off even the memory of his family from the face of the earth," 
Psalms109:15  
Psalms109:16 because he never once showed love or kindness to others, but persecuted the poor, the brokenhearted, and afflicted ones, even putting them to death!" 
Psalms109:17 Since he enjoyed cursing them, may all his curses now come raining back on him until it all overwhelms him with misfortune! Since he refused to bless others, God, withhold every single blessing from him!" 
Psalms109:18 Bitterness, such vile vindictiveness, was upon everything he did. Cursing was his lifestyle." 
Psalms109:19 So smother him now with his own curses as his just reward. This will be the Lord’s punishment upon him and all my lying accusers who speak evil against me. 
Psalms109:20  
Psalms109:21 But now, O  Yahweh -God, make yourself real to me like you promised me you would. Because of your constant love and your heart-melting kindness, come be my hero and deliver me!" 
Psalms109:22 I’m so broken, needy and hurting. My heart is pierced through and I’m so wounded." 
Psalms109:23 I’m slipping down a dark slope, shaken to the core, and helpless." 
Psalms109:24 All my fasting has left me so weak I can hardly stand. Now I’m shriveled up, nothing but skin and bones." 
Psalms109:25 I’m the example of failure and shame to all who see me. They just walk by me, shaking their heads." 
Psalms109:26 You have to help me, O Lord God! My true hero, come to my rescue and save me, for you are loving and kind." 
Psalms109:27 Then everyone will know that you have won my victory, and they will all say to the Lord, “You have finished it!”" 
Psalms109:28 So let them curse me if they want, but I know you will bless me! All their efforts to destroy me will fail, but I will succeed and be glad." 
Psalms109:29 So let my Satan-like accusers fail! Make them look ridiculous if they try to come against me. Clothe them with a robe of guilty shame from this day on! 
Psalms109:30 But I will give my thanks to you over and over, and everyone will hear my lavish praises." 
Psalms109:31 For you stand right next to the broken ones as their saving hero to rescue them from all their accusers! 
Psalms110:1 Yahweh said to my Lord, the Messiah: “Sit with me as enthroned ruler while I subdue your every enemy. They will bow low before you as I make them a footstool for your feet.”" 
Psalms110:2 Messiah, I know God himself will establish your kingdom as you reign in Zion-glory. For he says to you, “Rule in the midst of your enemies!”" 
Psalms110:3 Your people will be your love offerings. In the day of your mighty power you will be exalted, and in the brightness of your holy ones you will shine as an army arising from the womb of the dawn, anointed with the dew of your youth!" 
Psalms110:4 Yahweh has taken a solemn oath and will never back away from it, saying, “You are a priest for eternity, after the manner of Melchizedek!”" 
Psalms110:5 The Lord stands in full authority to shatter to pieces the kings who stand against you on the day he displays his terrible wrath. 
Psalms110:6 He will judge every rebellious nation, filling their battlefields with corpses, and will shatter the strongholds of ruling powers." 
Psalms110:7 Yet he himself will drink from his inheritance as from a flowing brook; refreshed by love he will stand victorious! 
Psalms111:1 Shout hallelujah to Yahweh! May every one of his devoted lovers hear my passionate praise to him, even among the council of the holy ones." 
Psalms111:2 For God’s mighty miracles astound me! His wonders are so delightfully mysterious that they leave all who seek them astonished. 
Psalms111:3 Everything he does is full of splendor and beauty! Each miracle demonstrates his eternal perfection. 
Psalms111:4 His unforgettable works of surpassing wonder reveal his grace and tender mercy. 
Psalms111:5 He satisfies all who love and trust him, and he keeps every promise he makes." 
Psalms111:6 He reveals mighty power and marvels to his people by handing them nations as a gift. 
Psalms111:7 All God accomplishes is flawless, faithful, and fair, and his every word proves trustworthy and true." 
Psalms111:8 They are steadfast forever and ever, formed from truth and righteousness." 
Psalms111:9 His forever-love paid a full ransom for his people so that now we’re free to come before Yahweh to worship his holy and awesome name! 
Psalms111:10 Where can wisdom be found? It is born in the fear of God. Everyone who follows his ways will never lack his living-understanding. And the adoration of God will abide throughout eternity! 
Psalms112:1 Shout in celebration of praise to the Lord! Everyone who loves the Lord and delights in him will cherish his words and be blessed beyond expectation. 
Psalms112:2 Their descendants will be prosperous and influential. Every generation of the righteous will experience his favor. 
Psalms112:3 Great blessing and wealth fills the house of the wise, for their integrity endures forever." 
Psalms112:4 Even if darkness overtakes them, sunrise-brilliance will come bursting through because they are gracious to others, so tender and true." 
Psalms112:5 Life is good for the one who is generous and charitable, conducting affairs with honesty and truth." 
Psalms112:6 Their circumstances will never shake them and others will never forget their example. 
Psalms112:7 They will not live in fear or dread of what may come, for their hearts are firm, ever secure in their faith." 
Psalms112:8 Steady and strong, they will not be afraid, but will calmly face their every foe until they all go down in defeat." 
Psalms112:9 Never stingy and always generous to those in need, they lived lives of influence and honor that will never be forgotten, for they were full of good deeds." 
Psalms112:10 But the wicked take one look at a life lived like this and they grit their teeth in anger, not understanding their bliss. The wicked slink away speechless in the darkness that falls, where hope dies and all their dreams fade away to nothing, nothing at all!" 
Psalms113:1 Hallelujah! Praise the Lord! Go ahead, praise the Lord, all you loving servants of God! Keep it up! Praise him some more!" 
Psalms113:2 For the glorious name of the Lord is blessed forever and ever. 
Psalms113:3 From sunrise-brilliance to sunset-beauty, lift up his praise from dawn to dusk!" 
Psalms113:4 For he rules on high over the nations with a glory that outshines even the heavens. 
Psalms113:5 No one can be compared to God, enthroned on high!" 
Psalms113:6 He stoops down to look upon the sky and the earth. 
Psalms113:7 He promotes the poor, picking them up from the dirt, and rescues the needy from the garbage dump." 
Psalms113:8 He turns paupers into princes and seats them on their royal thrones of honor. 
Psalms113:9 God’s grace provides for the barren ones a joyful home with children so that even childless couples find a family. He makes them happy parents surrounded by their pride and joy. That’s the God we praise, so give it all to him!" 
Psalms114:1 Many years ago the Jewish people escaped Egypt’s tyranny," 
Psalms114:2 so that Israel, God’s people of praise, would become his holy sanctuary, his kingdom on the earth." 
Psalms114:3 The Red Sea waters saw them coming and ran the other way! Then later, the Jordan River too moved aside so that they could all pass through." 
Psalms114:4 The land shuddered with fear. Mountains and hills shook with dread. 
Psalms114:5 O sea, what happened to you to make you flee? O Jordan, what was it that made you turn and run?" 
Psalms114:6 O mountains, what frightened you so? And you hills, what made you shiver?" 
Psalms114:7 Tremble, O earth, for you are in the presence of the Lord, the presence of the God of Jacob." 
Psalms114:8 He splits open boulders and brings up bubbling water. Gushing streams burst forth when he is near! 
Psalms115:1 God, glorify your name! Yes, your name alone be glorified, not ours. For you are the one who loves us passionately, and you are faithful and true." 
Psalms115:2 Why should the unbelievers mock us, saying, “Where is this God of yours?”" 
Psalms115:3 But we know our God rules from the heavens, and he takes delight in all that he does." 
Psalms115:4 The unbelievers worship what they make— their wealth and their work. 
Psalms115:5 They idolize what they own and what they make with their hands, but their things can’t talk to them or answer their prayers. Their possessions will never satisfy. Their futile faith in dead idols and dead works can never bring life or meaning to their souls. Blind men can only create blind things. Those deaf to God can only make a deaf image. Dead men can only create dead idols. And everyone who trusts in these powerless, dead things will be just like what they worship—powerless and dead." 
Psalms115:6  
Psalms115:7  
Psalms115:8  
Psalms115:9 So trust in the Lord, all his people. For he is the only true hero, the wraparound God who is our shield!" 
Psalms115:10 You, his priests, trust in the Lord. For he is the only true hero, God-wrapped-around-us as our shield." 
Psalms115:11 Yes, all his lovers who bow before him, trust in the Lord. For he is our only true hero, God-wrapped-around-us as our shield." 
Psalms115:12 The Lord will never forget us in our need; he will bless us indeed! He will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron, his priest." 
Psalms115:13 Yes! He will bless his devoted lovers who bow before him, no matter who they are." 
Psalms115:14 God himself will fill you with more. Blessings upon blessings will be heaped upon you and upon your children from the maker of heaven and earth, the very God who made you!" 
Psalms115:15  
Psalms115:16 The heavens belong to our God; they are his alone, but he has given us the earth and put us in charge." 
Psalms115:17 Dead people cannot praise the Lord, but we can! Those who sink to the silence of the grave can no longer give glory to God, but we can! So let’s praise the Lord and let it go on forever. Hallelujah, and praise the Lord!" 
Psalms115:18  
Psalms116:1 I am passionately in love with God because he listens to me. He hears my prayers and answers them. 
Psalms116:2 As long as I live I’ll keep praying to him, for he stoops down to listen to my heart’s cry." 
Psalms116:3 Death once stared me in the face, and I was close to slipping into its dark shadows. I was terrified and overcome with sorrow." 
Psalms116:4 I cried out to the Lord, “God, come and save me!”" 
Psalms116:5 He was so kind, so gracious to me. Because of his passion toward me, he made everything right and he restored me." 
Psalms116:6 So I’ve learned from my experience that God protects the vulnerable. For I was broken and brought low, but he answered me and came to my rescue!" 
Psalms116:7 Now I can say to myself and to all, “Relax and rest, be confident and serene, for the Lord rewards fully those who simply trust in him.”" 
Psalms116:8 God has rescued my soul from death’s fear and dried my eyes of many tears. He’s kept my feet firmly on his path 
Psalms116:9 and strengthened me so that I may please him and walk before Yahweh in his fields of life. 
Psalms116:10 Even when it seems I’m surrounded by many liars and my own fears, and though I’m hurting in my suffering and trauma, I still stay faithful to God and speak words of faith." 
Psalms116:11  
Psalms116:12 So now, what can I ever give back to God to repay him for the blessings he’s poured out on me?" 
Psalms116:13 I will lift up his cup of salvation and praise him extravagantly for all that he’s done for me. 
Psalms116:14 I will fulfill the promise I made to God in the presence of his gathered people. 
Psalms116:15 When one of God’s holy lovers dies, it is costly to the Lord, touching his heart." 
Psalms116:16 Lord, because I am your loving servant, you have broken open my life and freed me from my chains." 
Psalms116:17 Now I’ll worship you passionately and bring to you my sacrifice of praise, drenched with thanksgiving!" 
Psalms116:18 I’ll keep my promise to you, God, in the presence of your gathered people, just like I said I would." 
Psalms116:19 I will worship you here in your living presence, in the temple in Jerusalem. I will worship and sing hallelujah, for I praise you, Lord!" 
Psalms117:1 Let everyone everywhere shine with praise to Yahweh! Let it all out! Go ahead and praise him! 
Psalms117:2 For he has conquered us with his great love, and his kindness has melted our hearts. His faithfulness lasts forever, and he will never fail you. So go ahead, let it all out! Praise Yah! O Yah!" 
Psalms118:1 Keep on giving your thanks to God, for he is so good! His constant, tender love lasts forever!" 
Psalms118:2 Let all his princely people sing, “His constant, tender love lasts forever!”" 
Psalms118:3 Let all his holy priests sing, “His constant, tender love lasts forever!”" 
Psalms118:4 Let all his lovers who bow low before him sing, “His constant, tender love lasts forever!”" 
Psalms118:5 Out of my deep anguish and pain I prayed, and God, you helped me as a father. You came to my rescue and broke open the way into a beautiful and broad place." 
Psalms118:6 Now I know, Lord, that you are for me, and I will never fear what man can do to me." 
Psalms118:7 For you stand beside me as my hero who rescues me. I’ve seen with my own eyes the defeat of my enemies. I’ve triumphed over them all! 
Psalms118:8 Lord, it is so much better to trust in you to save me than to put my confidence in someone else." 
Psalms118:9 Yes, it is so much better to trust in the Lord to save me than to put my confidence in celebrities." 
Psalms118:10 Once I was hemmed in and surrounded by those who don’t love you. But by Yahweh ’s supernatural power I overcame them all! 
Psalms118:11 Yes, they surrounded me, like a swarm of killer bees swirling around me. I was trapped like one trapped by a raging fire; I was surrounded with no way out and at the point of collapse. But by Yahweh ’s supernatural power, I overcame them all!" 
Psalms118:12  
Psalms118:13 They pushed me right up to the edge, and I was ready to fall, but you helped me to triumph, and together we overcame them all." 
Psalms118:14 Lord, you are my true strength and my glory-song, my champion, my Savior!" 
Psalms118:15 The joyful songs I now sing will be sung again in the hearts and homes of all your devoted lovers. My loud shouts of victory will echo throughout the land. For Yahweh ’s right hand conquers valiantly! 
Psalms118:16 The right hand of Yahweh exalts! The right hand of Yahweh will never fail. 
Psalms118:17 You will not let them kill me, but I will live to tell the world what the Lord has done for me." 
Psalms118:18 Yes, the Lord punished me as I deserved, but he’ll never give me over to death." 
Psalms118:19 Swing wide, you gates of righteousness, and let me pass through, and I will enter into God’s presence to worship only him." 
Psalms118:20 I have found the gateway to God, the pathway to his presence for all his devoted lovers." 
Psalms118:21 I will offer all my loving praise to you, and I thank you so much for answering my prayer and bringing me salvation!" 
Psalms118:22 The very stone the masons rejected as flawed has turned out to be the most important capstone of the arch, holding up the very house of God." 
Psalms118:23 The Lord himself is the one who has done this, and it’s so amazing, so marvelous to see!" 
Psalms118:24 This is the very day of the Lord that brings gladness and joy, filling our hearts with glee." 
Psalms118:25 O God, please come and save us again; bring us your breakthrough-victory!" 
Psalms118:26 Blessed is this one who comes to us, the sent one of the Lord. And from within the temple we cry, “We bless you!”" 
Psalms118:27 For the Lord our God has brought us his glory-light. I offer him my life in joyous sacrifice. Tied tightly to your altar, I will bring you praise. For you are the God of my life and I lift you high, exalting you to the highest place." 
Psalms118:28  
Psalms118:29 So let’s keep on giving our thanks to God, for he is so good! His constant, tender love lasts forever!" 
Psalms119:1 You’re only truly happy when you walk in total integrity, walking in the light of God’s Word." 
Psalms119:2 What joy overwhelms everyone who keeps the ways of God, those who seek him as their heart’s passion!" 
Psalms119:3 They’ll never do what’s wrong but will always choose the paths of the Lord. 
Psalms119:4 God has prescribed the right way to live: obeying his laws with all our hearts. 
Psalms119:5 How I long for my life to bring you glory as I follow each and every one of your holy precepts! 
Psalms119:6 Then I’ll never be ashamed, for I take strength from all your commandments." 
Psalms119:7 I will give my thanks to you from a heart of love and truth. And every time I learn more of your righteous judgments," 
Psalms119:8 I will be faithful to all that your Word reveals— so don’t ever give up on me! 
Psalms119:9 How can a young man stay pure? Only by living in the Word of God and walking in its truth. 
Psalms119:10 I have longed for you with the passion of my heart; don’t let me stray from your directions! 
Psalms119:11 I consider your Word to be my greatest treasure, and I treasure it in my heart to keep me from committing sin’s treason against you." 
Psalms119:12 My wonderful God, you are to be praised above all; teach me the power of your decrees!" 
Psalms119:13 I speak continually of your laws as I recite out loud your counsel to me. 
Psalms119:14 I find more joy in following what you tell me to do than in chasing after all the wealth of the world. 
Psalms119:15 I set my heart on your precepts and pay close attention to all your ways. 
Psalms119:16 My delight is found in all your laws, and I won’t forget to walk in your words." 
Psalms119:17 Let me, your servant, walk in abundance of life that I may always live to obey your truth." 
Psalms119:18 Open my eyes to see the miracle-wonders hidden in Scripture. 
Psalms119:19 My life on earth is so brief, so tutor me in the ways of your wisdom." 
Psalms119:20 I am continually consumed by these irresistible longings, these cravings to obey your every commandment!" 
Psalms119:21 Your displeasure rests with those who are arrogant, who think they know everything; you rebuke the rebellious who refuse your laws." 
Psalms119:22 Don’t let them mock and scorn me for obeying you. 
Psalms119:23 For even if the princes and my leaders choose to criticize me, I will continue to serve you and walk in your plans for my life." 
Psalms119:24 Your commandments are my counselors; your Word is my light and delight! 
Psalms119:25 Lord, I’m fading away. I’m discouraged and lying in the dust; revive me by your word, just like you promised you would." 
Psalms119:26 I’ve poured out my life before you, and you’ve always been there for me. So now I ask: teach me more of your holy decrees." 
Psalms119:27 Open up my understanding to the ways of your wisdom, and I will meditate deeply on your splendor and your wonders." 
Psalms119:28 My life’s strength melts away with grief and sadness; come strengthen me and encourage me with your words. 
Psalms119:29 Keep me far away from what is false; give me grace to stay true to your laws. 
Psalms119:30 I’ve chosen to obey your truth and walk in the splendor-light of all that you teach me. 
Psalms119:31 Lord, don’t allow me to make a mess of my life, for I cling to your commands and follow them as closely as I can." 
Psalms119:32 I will run after you with delight in my heart, for you will make me obedient to your instructions." 
Psalms119:33 Give me revelation about the meaning of your ways so I can enjoy the reward of following them fully. 
Psalms119:34 Give me an understanding heart so that I can passionately know and obey your truth. 
Psalms119:35 Guide me into the paths that please you, for I take delight in all that you say." 
Psalms119:36 Cause my heart to bow before your words of wisdom and not to the wealth of this world. 
Psalms119:37 Help me turn my eyes away from illusions so that I pursue only that which is true; drench my soul with life as I walk in your paths. 
Psalms119:38 Reassure me of your promises, for I am your beloved, your servant who bows before you." 
Psalms119:39 Defend me from the criticism I face for keeping your beautiful words. 
Psalms119:40 See how I long with cravings for more of your ways? Let your righteousness revive my spirit! 
Psalms119:41 May your tender love overwhelm me, O Lord, for you are my Savior and you keep your promises." 
Psalms119:42 I’ll always have an answer for those who mock me because I trust in your word. 
Psalms119:43 May I never forget your truth, for I rely upon your precepts." 
Psalms119:44 I will observe your laws every moment of the day and will never forget the words you say. 
Psalms119:45 I will walk with you in complete freedom, for I seek to follow your every command." 
Psalms119:46 When I stand before kings, I will tell them the truth and will never be ashamed." 
Psalms119:47 My passion and delight is in your word, for I love what you say to me!" 
Psalms119:48 I long for more revelation of your truth, for I love the light of your word as I meditate on your decrees." 
Psalms119:49 Lord, never forget the promises you’ve made to me, for they are my hope and confidence." 
Psalms119:50 In all of my affliction I find great comfort in your promises, for they have kept me alive!" 
Psalms119:51 No matter how bitterly the proud mockers speak against me, I refuse to budge from your precepts." 
Psalms119:52 Your revelation-light is eternal; I’m encouraged every time I think about your truth! 
Psalms119:53 Whenever I see the wicked breaking your laws, I feel horrible." 
Psalms119:54 As I journey through life, I put all your statutes to music; they become the theme of my joyous songs." 
Psalms119:55 Throughout the night I think of you, dear God; I treasure your every word to me." 
Psalms119:56 All this joy is mine as I follow your ways! 
Psalms119:57 You are my satisfaction, Lord, and all that I need, so I’m determined to do everything you say." 
Psalms119:58 With all my heart I seek your favor; pour out your grace on me as you promised! 
Psalms119:59 When I realize that I’m going astray, I turn back to obey your instructions." 
Psalms119:60 I give my all to follow your revelation-light; I will not delay to obey. 
Psalms119:61 Even when temptations encircle me with evil, I won’t forget for a moment to follow your commands." 
Psalms119:62 In the middle of the night I awake to give thanks to you because of all your revelation-light—so right and true! 
Psalms119:63 Anyone who loves you and bows in obedience to your words will be my friend. 
Psalms119:64 Give me more revelation of your ways, for I see your love and tender care everywhere." 
Psalms119:65 Your extravagant kindness to me makes me want to follow your words even more! 
Psalms119:66 Teach me how to make good decisions, and give me revelation-light, for I believe in your commands." 
Psalms119:67 Before I was humbled I used to always wander astray, but now I see the wisdom of your words." 
Psalms119:68 Everything you do is beautiful, flowing from your goodness; teach me the power of your wonderful words!" 
Psalms119:69 Proud boasters make up lies about me because I am passionate to follow all that you say. 
Psalms119:70 Their hearts are dull and void of feelings, but I find my true treasure in your truth." 
Psalms119:71 The punishment you brought me through was the best thing that could have happened to me, for it taught me your ways." 
Psalms119:72 The words you speak to me are worth more than all the riches and wealth in the whole world! 
Psalms119:73 Your very hands have held me and made me who I am; give me more revelation-light so I may learn to please you more. 
Psalms119:74 May all your devoted lovers see how you treat me and be glad, for your words are entwined with my heart." 
Psalms119:75 Lord, I know that your judgments are always right. Even when it’s me you judge, you’re still faithful and true." 
Psalms119:76 Send your kind mercy-kiss to comfort me, your servant, just like you promised you would." 
Psalms119:77 Love me tenderly so I can go on, for I delight in your life-giving truth." 
Psalms119:78 Shame upon the proud liars! See how they oppress me, all because of my passion for your precepts!" 
Psalms119:79 May all your devoted lovers follow me as I follow the path of your instruction. 
Psalms119:80 Make me passionate and wholehearted to fulfill your every wish, so that I’ll never have to be ashamed of myself." 
Psalms119:81 I’m lovesick with yearnings for more of your salvation, for my heart is entwined with your Word." 
Psalms119:82 I’m consumed with longings for your promises, so I ask, “When will they all come true?”" 
Psalms119:83 My soul feels dry and shriveled, useless and forgotten, but I will never forget your living truth." 
Psalms119:84 How much longer must I wait until you punish my persecutors? For I am your loving servant. 
Psalms119:85 Arrogant men who hate your truth and never obey your laws have laid a trap for my life. 
Psalms119:86 They don’t know that everything you say is true, so they harass me with their lies. Help me, Lord!" 
Psalms119:87 They’ve nearly destroyed my life, but I refuse to yield; I still live according to your Word." 
Psalms119:88 Revive me with your tender love and spare my life by your kindness, and I will continue to obey you." 
Psalms119:89 Standing firm in the heavens and fastened to eternity is the Word of God. 
Psalms119:90 Your faithfulness flows from one generation to the next; all that you created sits firmly in place to testify of you. 
Psalms119:91 By your decree everything stands at attention, for all that you have made serves you." 
Psalms119:92 Because your words are my deepest delight, I didn’t give up when all else was lost." 
Psalms119:93 I can never forget the profound revelations you’ve taught me, for they have kept me alive more than once." 
Psalms119:94 Lord, I’m all yours, and you are my Savior; I have sought to live my life pleasing to you." 
Psalms119:95 Even though evil men wait in ambush to kill me, I will set my heart before you to understand more of your ways." 
Psalms119:96 I’ve learned that there is nothing perfect in this imperfect world except your words, for they bring such fantastic freedom into my life!" 
Psalms119:97 O how I love and treasure your law; throughout the day I fill my heart with its light! 
Psalms119:98 By considering your commands I have an edge over my enemies, for I take seriously everything you say." 
Psalms119:99 You have given me more understanding than those who teach me, for I’ve absorbed your eye-opening revelation." 
Psalms119:100 You have graced me with more insight than the old sages because I have not failed to walk in the light of your ways. 
Psalms119:101 I refused to bend my morals when temptation was before me so that I could become obedient to your Word. 
Psalms119:102 I refuse to turn away from difficult truths, for you yourself have taught me to love your words." 
Psalms119:103 How sweet are your living promises to me; sweeter than honey is your revelation-light. 
Psalms119:104 For your truth is the source of my understanding, not the falsehoods of those who don’t know you, which I despise." 
Psalms119:105 Truth’s shining light guides me in my choices and decisions; the revelation of your Word makes my pathway clear. 
Psalms119:106 To live my life by your righteous rules has been my holy and lifelong commitment. 
Psalms119:107 I’m bruised and broken, overwhelmed by it all; breathe life into me again by your living word." 
Psalms119:108 Lord, receive my grateful thanks and teach me more of how to please you." 
Psalms119:109 Even though my life hangs in the balance, I’ll keep following what you’ve taught me, no matter what." 
Psalms119:110 The ungodly have done their best to throw me off track, but I’ll not deviate from what you’ve told me to do." 
Psalms119:111 Everything you speak to me is like joyous treasure, filling my life with gladness." 
Psalms119:112 I have determined in my heart to obey whatever you say, fully and forever!" 
Psalms119:113 I despise those who can’t keep commitments, for I passionately love your revelation-light!" 
Psalms119:114 You’re my place of quiet retreat, and your wraparound presence becomes my shield as I wrap myself in your Word!" 
Psalms119:115 Go away! Leave me, all you workers of wickedness, for you can’t stop me from following every command of my God." 
Psalms119:116 Lord, strengthen my inner being by the promises of your Word so that I may live faithful and unashamed for you." 
Psalms119:117 Lift me up and I will be safe. Empower me to live every moment in the light of your ways. 
Psalms119:118 Lord, you reject those who reject your laws, for they fool no one but themselves!" 
Psalms119:119 The wicked are thrown away, discarded and valueless. That’s why I will keep loving all of your laws!" 
Psalms119:120 My body trembles in holy awe of you, leaving me speechless, for I’m frightened of your righteous judgments." 
Psalms119:121 Don’t leave me to the mercies of those who hate me, for I live to do what is just and fair." 
Psalms119:122 Let me hear your promise of blessing over my life, breaking me free from the proud oppressors." 
Psalms119:123 As a lovesick lover, I yearn for more of your salvation and for your virtuous promises." 
Psalms119:124 Let me feel your tender love, for I am yours. Give me more understanding of your wonderful ways." 
Psalms119:125 I need more revelation from your Word to know more about you, for I’m in love with you!" 
Psalms119:126 Lord, the time has come for you to break through, for evil men keep breaking your laws." 
Psalms119:127 Truly, your message of truth means more to me than a vault filled with the purest gold." 
Psalms119:128 Every word you speak, every truth revealed, is always right and beautiful to me, for I hate what is phony or false." 
Psalms119:129 Your marvelous words are living miracles; no wonder I long to obey everything you say. 
Psalms119:130 Break open your Word within me until revelation-light shines out! Those with open hearts are given insight into your plans. 
Psalms119:131 I open my mouth and inhale the Word of God because I crave the revelation of your commands. 
Psalms119:132 Turn your heart to me, Lord, and show me your grace like you do to every one of your godly lovers."
